raw_consumer_statement:
Company : Barclays ( Barclays Bank Delaware ) Product : Credit card Issue : Billing dispute / chargeback denial Narrative : I am filing a complaint regarding Barclays handling of a credit card billing dispute involving a XXXX marketplace purchase ( seller : XXXX ). 
XXXX authorized a return extension beyond the original return window and issued a return authorization ( RMA ) with a final return-by date of XX/XX/year>. I relied on that authorization. 
On XX/XX/year>, I physically brought the items to a XXXX store to complete the return as instructed. Store staff scanned the return barcode ; however, the system failed and would not process the return. While I was in the store, XXXX customer service was contacted and acknowledged the issue and escalated it, but the return was never completed due to their system/process failurenot due to any action or inaction on my part. 
I subsequently disputed the charge with Barclays and provided documentation including : The authorized return extension to XX/XX/year> Walmarts in-store return instructions and barcode Evidence of my in-store return attempt on XX/XX/XXXX ( including timestamped photos ) XXXX correspondence acknowledging escalation Barclays denied the dispute , relying on a 30-day return policy. This is inapplicable because XXXX extended the return window and issued a valid RMA, and I attempted the return within that authorized timeframe. The denial does not appear to have considered the authorized extension or the documented, timely return attempt that failed due to XXXX system.

I am requesting that Barclays : Reopen and re-evaluate the dispute based on the full record Correctly apply the not as described / defective merchandise standard, recognizing that a timely, authorized return was attempted but prevented by the merchants system Provide a written explanation addressing the authorized return extension and the documented in-store attempt on XX/XX/year> I have submitted a complete packet of supporting documentation via fax and can provide it again upon request.I am requesting a full reversal of the charge based on the merchants failure to complete an authorized return within the approved timeframe. 
I fully complied with all return instructions and attempted the return on XX/XX/year>, within the authorized extension. The return was not completed due to a system failure outside of my control.
